name: GT-state-bounded
source: HOS, refs/hos/joa-m.md:378 (1.2.2 Lemma) + proof, VERBATIM: "Let A be an order unit space with order unit e. If  $\rho \in A^*$  then  $\rho \in S(A)$  if and only if  $\|\rho\| = \rho(e) = 1$ ." Proof gives |rho(a)|<=||a|| for a state rho (||rho||=1). Applied to rho a state on B(H)_sa (order unit 1): |rho(a)|<=||a||.
